items.text: {1} Mount Everest is the highest peak in {2} Himalayas.
items.explanation: Individual mountains take no article (Mount Everest), but mountain ranges take 'the' (the Himalayas).

items.text: She flew from {1} United States to {2} Netherlands.
items.explanation: Countries whose names are plural or contain 'States/Kingdom/Republic' take 'the' (the United States, the Netherlands).

items.text: We sailed across {1} Atlantic to reach {2} United Kingdom.
items.explanation: Oceans take 'the' (the Atlantic), as do countries with 'Kingdom/States' in the name (the United Kingdom).

items.text: {1} Lake Victoria is larger than {2} Italy.
items.explanation: Lakes named 'Lake X' take no article (Lake Victoria), and most single-word countries take none either (Italy).
Rivers take 'the' (the Nile), while most countries take no article (Egypt).
